title: Clauding Thought Manifest
description: Project DNA — describes the stack, architecture, conventions, and boundaries of a codebase so that AI agents can generate code that fits.
$comment: Canonical copy. Also bundled in skills/init/ for direct reference.

version.description: Semantic version of the governance layer.

initialized.description: ISO date when the governance layer was first generated.

last_evolved.description: ISO date of the last /evolve run, or null.

changelog.description: Path to the governance changelog file.

auto_accept.description: When true, .claude/settings.json is generated with all tools auto-accepted. Governance hooks (secret-filter, destructive-guard) remain active as the safety layer.
